verses.text: Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitangah na tun' uh ciangin, Topa pahtawina-in leitang tawlngak hun na omsak ding uh hi
Kum guk sung note in na lo uh na pawi ding uh a, kum guk sung na leenggui lo uh hahin a gahte na kaikhawm ding uh hi
Ahih hangin a kum sagihna-ah leitang-a' ding a thupi tawlngakna sabbath, Topa pahtawina sabbath om ding hi. Note in na lo uh na pawi kei ding uh a, na leenggui lo uh na hah kei ding uh hi
A li pote note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh a, a kipuahlo leenggui gahte na khawm kei ding uh hi. Leitang-a' dingin a thupi tawlngakna hi ding hi

Lo na khawh loh uh hangin leitang tawlngak kumin a piang tawmte in note-a' ding, na sila numei leh na sila pasalte-a' ding, a kicial nasemte leh note tawh a teng a peem mite-a' ding an hong sik ding hi
A piang khempeuhte pen na bawngte uh leh na leitang uhah a om ganhingte' an ding ahi hi
“Kum nipi sagih hun pen note-a' dingin kum sawmlilekua ahih theihna dingin note in kum nipi sagih, kum sagih mun sagihvei na simto ding uh hi
Tua ciangin note in kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in nakpi-in peengkul na tum ding uh a, kilemna ni-in note in na gamsung khempeuh uhah peengkul aw na gingkhiasak ding uh hi

Note in a kum sawmngana siangtho sakin, gamsunga a teng mi khempeuh tungah suahtakna thu na zasak ding uh hi. Note in nomau' neihsa ciat ngahkikin, sila-in a kizuak mite nomau' innkuanpihte ciat kiangah na ciahkik uh ciangin note-a' dingin jubilee hi ding hi
Tua a kum sawmngana pen note-a' dingin jubilee hi ding hi. Tua kum sungin note in lo pawiloin, a li pote zong laloin, a kihahlo leengguite panin zong leenggah na khawm kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen jubilee ahi hi. Tua pen note-a' dingin siangtho ding a, note in lo panin a piang tawmte na ne ding uh hi
“Hih jubilee kum sungin note khempeuh in nomau' neihsa ciat na ngahkik ding uh hi
Note in na vengte' tungah na zuak uh ahi zongin na vengte' kiang panin na lei uh ahi zongin note khatlekhat na kikhem kei ding uh hi
Jubilee khit ciangin a jubilee kik dong a kum phazah tawh kituakin note in na vengte uh kiang panin lei-in, a an piang ding kum zah tawh kituakin amau in note tungah hong zuak ding uh hi
A kum a tam lai leh a man na tamsak ding uh a, a kum a tawm leh a man na tawmsak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh no tungah hong zuak pen a tuk tung ding zah ahi hi
Note khatlekhat kikhem loin na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte leh ka biakna ngeina kipte zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua hi leh note lungmuang takin gam sungah na teng ding uh hi
Leitang in an hong piangsak ding a, note in na khamtakun ne-in, lungmuang takin na teng ding uh hi
“Note in, ‘Lo lah pawiloin, an lah la kei lehang, a kum sagihna-ah bang ne ding ihi hiam?’ na cih uh leh
keimah in a kum gukna-ah note tungah thupha kong pia ding a, kum thum sung khom ding an hong piang ding hi
A kum giatna-ah lo na pawi ding uh ciangin, note in anlui na ne lai ding uh hi. Anthak hong tun' a kum kuana mateng note in a lui na ne ding uh hi
“Leitang pen keima-a' ahih manin neihsuak dingin leitang kizuaklo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen kei tawh a omkhawm khualmi leh peemtate na hi uh hi
“Note in na neih uh leitang khempeuh na kitanhkik sak thei ding uh hi
Na sanggampa zawngin a neihsa leitang khenkhat a zuak leh, amah tawh a kinai a behpa hong pai-in a sanggampa' zuaksa tanh ding hi
Mi khat in tua na a tatsak ding mi a neih kei a, amahmah hong haukikin a tanhzo dingin a pian' leh
amah in tua na a zuak zawh a kumte sim ding a, a zuakna mipa tungah a piak lai ding a kisam zah pia ding a, amah in a neihsa ngahkik ding hi

Ahih hangin amah in ama-a' dingin ngahkik zawhna ding lampi a neih kei leh, tua ama zuak leitang pen jubilee kum mateng a leipa' khutsungah om ding hi. Jubilee kum ciangin tua leitang kipiakhia ding a, amah in a neihsa ngahkik ding hi
“Mi khat in khuapikulh sungah ten'na inn khat a zuak leh, a kizuak khit kum khat bit sungin amah in tanhkik thei ding a, kum khat bit sungin amah in tatkik theihna ding thu nei ding hi
Tua pen kum khat bit sungin a kitatkik kei leh, khuapikulh sunga om tua inn pen a leipa in khang tawntungin a neih dingin kibawlsak ding a, jubilee kum ciangin zong kipiakhia kik tuan nawnlo ding hi
Ahih hangin a kimkotah kulh a neilo khua neu-a innte pen gamsung lote tawh a kibangin kingaihsun ding hi. Tuate kitanhkik thei ding a, jubilee kum ciangin tuate kipiakhia ding hi
Ahi zongin Levi mite' khuapite, amau' neihsa khuapite-a innte ahih leh, Levi mite in khatvei peuh ciangin tanh thei ding uh hi

Levi mi khatpeuh in ama tatkik theih ding hinapi a tatkikzawh kei leh, amau' neihsa khuapi sunga tua inn pen jubilee kum ciangin kipiakik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi mite' khuapi sunga innte pen Israel mite' lakah amau' neihsa ahi hi
Ahih hangin amau' khuapi taang gamte kizuak theilo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amau' neih tawntung na ahi hi
“Na sanggampa uh zawngin, note bangin amah a kivak zawh kei leh, note in amah na vak ding uh hi. Khualmi leh peemta bangin amah pen note tawh hong om ding hi
Na sanggampa uh no kiangah hong ten' theihna dingin ama tung panin a meet a khang la kei un la, na Pasian uh zahtak un
Note in ama tungah a meetin sum leitawi pialoin, ama tungah a meetin na an uh zong na pia kei ding uh hi
Kei pen note' Pasian ahi ding leh, note tungah Kanaan leitang a hong pia dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“Na gei-a om na sanggampa zawngin, nangma tungah amahmah hong kizuak leh, sila bangin na na semsak kei ding hi
Amah pen a kicial nasem leh peemta bangin nang kiangah om ding hi. Amah in jubilee kum mateng nangma na hong sem ding a
tua ciangin nang kiang panin amah leh ama kiangah a om a tate paikhia ding a, ama innkuan zuan kikin, a pate' neihsa ngahkik ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte hi a, amaute sila-in kizuaklo ding hi
Note in hih gawpgawpna tawh amah na uk kei ding uh a, na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi
Note in na neih theih ding uh sila numei leh sila pasalte hih bang ahi hi: Na kimkot uha om minam dangte lak panin sila numei leh sila pasal na lei thei ding uh hi
Note in na gamsung uhah a suak, note lakah a hong peem khualmite leh note tawh a om amau' innkuante lak panin zong na lei thei ding uh a, amaute pen nomau-a' hi thei ding uh hi

Note in amaute pen note' khit ciangin na tapate uh tungah amau' neih tawntung dingin a luah dingin na pia thei ding uh hi. Note in sila-in amaute na nei thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggam uh Israel mite khatlekhat hih gawpgawpna tawh na ki-uk kei ding uh hi

“Note lakah a teng khualmi ahih kei leh peemta khat hong hau a, ama kianga om na sanggampa uh zawngin, no tawh a om khualmipa tung ahi a, peemta mipa tungah ahi zongin, tua ahih kei leh khualmipa' innkuan khat peuhpeuh tungah amah a kizuak leh
amah a kizuak khit ciangin amah kitanhkik thei ding a, ama sanggamte khat peuhpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi

Ama innlak pa ahih kei leh a innlak sanggampa in tanh thei ding hi. Ama innkuan sunga a kinaipih a beh khatpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong amah a hauh leh amahmah kitanhkik thei ding hi

Midang tungah amahmah a kizuak-a kipan jubilee kum dong amah a leipa tawh tuat ding a, ama suahtakna ding sum pen a kum phazah tawh kituak hi ding hi. A topa tawh a omkhawm hun sungteng pen a kicial nasem khat thaman zahin seh ding hi
Kum tampi in a sap lai leh, amah in tuate tawh a kituakin ama thaman ding a kipiakna sung panin ama kitatkhiatna dingin pia kik ding hi
Ahih hangin jubilee kum ding kum tawmkhat bek in a sap leh amah in a topa tawh tuatna khat nei ding hi. Ama sepsak ding kum a omlai tawh kituakin ama kitatkhiatna dingin sum piakik ding hi
Amah pen a topa tungah a kum kumin a kicial nasempa tawh kibang ding hi. A topa in note' muhna-ah hih gawpgawpna tawh amah uklo ding hi
Hih bang danin amah a kitatkhiat kei leh, jubilee kum ciangin amah leh amah tawh a om a tate kikhahkhia ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite pen kei-a' dingin nasemte ahi uh hi. Amaute pen Egypt gam panin keimah in ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
